148.question: Find recent listings
samples: SELECT * FROM airbnb_listings WHERE year_listed >= (SELECT MAX(year_listed) - 1 FROM airbnb_listings);

149.question: Which cities are popular?
149.gold: SELECT city FROM airbnb_listings GROUP BY city ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3
samples: SELECT city, COUNT(*) as popularity FROM airbnb_listings GROUP BY city ORDER BY popularity DESC;
